title: Quarterly Roadmap Planning
agenda:
1. Review Q3 roadmap themes
2. Prioritize onboarding improvements, reporting exports, API reliability

notes_from_last: Q2 roadmap slipped on API reliability due to infra dependency. Team agreed to front-load that work in Q3. Noah to circulate updated themes before next session.
